description: Portuguese private health insurance provider offering health plans to individuals and employers. Provides coverage for medical consultations, hospital care, and dental services.
business_model: B2B2C - Health insurance sold through employers; B2C individual plans
target_market: Portuguese employers and individuals seeking private health coverage
competitive_advantage: Established Portuguese insurer, comprehensive coverage, local market knowledge

varden_fit.rationale: Major Portuguese insurer - potential partner for occupational health services integration
